title: Fan-shaped cake
description:
Do you think slice like segmentation doesn't look good?
Then let's try this fan-shaped segmentation!
body:
Do you think slice like segmentation doesn't look good?

Then let's try this fan-shaped segmentation!

But why is it not evenly distributed?



Little Steve~Come and eat the cake! Here's the largest one for you, you greedy cat loves eating cakes the most.


Take this small piece to the backyard, there is wheat inside, and they must also like to eat it,
Oh by the way, don't tell the chicks and cows that there are eggs and milk inside!


Send this second largest piece to the village, and the villagers and iron puppets also like to eat small cakes.


As for this one, you can leave it at the door at night. There's a saying in the village that monsters that come and go at night won't knock on your door~


Also, leave this one on the obsidian stove at home. I hope you won't get beaten up by those strange people in the Nether, haha.


Mom, what about the smallest one?
Hang it on the fishing hook when you go fishing, maybe you won't come back empty handed~


Give the last piece to Ender Dragon! After all, this year is the the Year of the Loong. Maybe Ender Dragon also has a birthday.


But what about you, Mom?
Mom doesn't like to eat cake~
